summary: DPA page correctly implements diner aesthetic with proper palette, typography, and layout. All required content elements are present and properly formatted for mobile narrow viewport.

violations.description: Main heading 'Data Processing Addendum' appears to use bold weight rather than black weight (font-black, 900) specified for primary public headings

actions: Consider applying font-black (900 weight) to the main 'Data Processing Addendum' heading to fully align with diner aesthetic typography requirements
